## Test Plan

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check:packages`
- [ ] `npm run check:release`

## Public Surface Checklist

- [ ] README/docs updates are included when public behavior changes.
- [ ] Shared fixtures cover new provider, framework, pricing, warning, or source behavior.
- [ ] Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, and Go parity is preserved or the gap is documented.
- [ ] No API keys, account IDs, private prompts, invoices, or raw provider exports are included.
